ValidationRule.description: INACTIVE. LAND close approval gate: at 6. Closed Won requires Legal Reviewed and Finance Approved. Lightweight checkbox gate (per Quoting D-1); a 1-step ApprovalProcess can replace it for SOC 2 later. Stage provisional (OQ-009). Activation by Nic.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'LAND', ISPICKVAL(StageName, '6. Closed Won'), OR( NOT(Legal_Reviewed__c), NOT(Finance_Approved__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Antes de marcar Closed Won en una oportunidad LAND, se requieren las aprobaciones de cierre: Revision Legal (Legal Reviewed) y Aprobacion de Finanzas (Finance Approved).
